items.name: Replica Rumi's Concoction

explicitModifiers.text: 90% reduced Duration
Gain 1 Endurance Charge on use
Petrified during Effect
+(35-50)% Chance to Block Attack Damage during Effect
+(20-30)% Chance to Block Spell Damage during Effect

items.flavourText:
"The most terrifying split second of my life." 
- Researcher Graven

items.name: Replica Witchfire Brew

implicitModifiers.text: Creates a Smoke Cloud on Use

explicitModifiers.text: (1-10)% increased Charges per use
(1-10)% reduced Charges per use
Grants Level 21 Vulnerability Curse Aura during Effect

items.flavourText:
"Nobody will listen to me, because I'm the only one that sees it.
Nothing left to do now but drink until this world makes sense."
- Researcher Graven

items.name: Replica Sorrow of the Divine

explicitModifiers.text: Life Recovery from Flasks also applies to Energy Shield during Effect
(25-50)% increased Duration
Eldritch Battery during Effect

items.flavourText:
"Success! Prototype #54 has tapped into that sliver of divinity that exists within.
Faith fuels the flesh, and the flesh fuels the fire..."

items.name: Replica Lavianga's Spirit

explicitModifiers.text: (30-50)% increased Amount Recovered
50% reduced Recovery rate
(5-15)% increased Attack Speed during Effect
(5-15)% increased Cast Speed during Effect
10% increased Mana Cost of Skills during Effect

items.flavourText: "An intriguing paradox."

items.name: Replica Reckless Defence

explicitModifiers.text: +(2-6)% Chance to Block Spell Damage
+(2-6)% Chance to Block Attack Damage
+10% chance to be Frozen, Shocked and Ignited

items.flavourText: "Prototype #298 must be contained in a non-conductive glass box at all times."

items.name: Replica Fragility
items.flavourText:
"Our defenses are failing at Outpost One. We can't hold out much
longer. All outposts, abandon your stations! Escape while you can!"
- Lead Researcher Ksaret, three hours post-Incident

items.name: Replica Primordial Might

explicitModifiers.text: -1 to maximum number of Summoned Golems
(25-30)% increased Damage if you Summoned a Golem in the past 8 seconds
Golems Summoned in the past 8 seconds deal (100-125)% increased Damage
Golems have (18-22)% increased Maximum Life
Primordial
Summoned Golems are Aggressive

items.flavourText:
"The summoned golems immediately battered through the chamber wall
and killed several guards, but their fury only lasted a short time."

items.name: Replica Powerlessness
items.flavourText:
"The suppression troops have stopped responding to my orders.
I'm no longer in charge, and I likely never truly was... I suspect
they're already coming for us."
- Lead Researcher Ksaret, one hour post-Incident

items.name: Replica Pacifism
items.flavourText:
"Release the type Delta test subjects. Unseal all prototype lockers.
Arm yourself! I know that, as researchers, you've never had to fight
before, but they're coming to kill us all. It's resist or die!"
- Lead Researcher Ksaret, two hours post-Incident

items.name: Replica Headhunter

explicitModifiers.text: +(40-66) to Strength
+(40-66) to Dexterity
+(50-72) to maximum Life
(20-30)% increased Damage with Hits against Magic monsters
20% chance when you Kill a Magic Monster to gain its Modifiers for 60 seconds

items.flavourText:
"A type Delta test subject escaped with Prototype #18. He was last seen
ten times the height of a man and crashing straight through walls."

items.name: Replica Badge of the Brotherhood

explicitModifiers.text: Your Maximum Endurance Charges is equal to your Maximum Frenzy Charges
+1 to maximum Fortification per Endurance Charge
(7-10)% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate of Travel Skills per Frenzy Charge
(20-25)% chance to lose a Frenzy Charge when you use a Travel Skill
(20-25)% chance to lose an Endurance Charge when you gain Fortification

items.flavourText:
"I stood upon the tower's edge, and saw that we had cracked the sky.
There is nowhere we can run that our sins will not find us now."
- Researcher Arn, last recorded words

items.name: Replica Bated Breath

explicitModifiers.text: -(25-15) to Intelligence
10% increased Damage
50% increased Fishing Pool Consumption
20% increased Fishing Range
(20-30)% increased Rarity of Fish Caught

items.flavourText:
"I cannot fathom the mysteries of Prototype #16. It did nearly nothing until I
brought it to [RESTRICTED]. It makes no sense!"
- Researcher Graven

items.name: Replica Tasalio's Sign

explicitModifiers.text: Adds (15-24) to (25-42) Cold Damage to Spells and Attacks
+(200-300) to Evasion Rating
Your Cold Damage cannot Freeze
Immune to Chill
Adds (60-72) to (80-96) Cold Damage against Chilled Enemies

items.flavourText:
"Likely our closest to the original, yet Prototype #22 still falls short.
Are these objects actually somehow resisting our efforts?"

items.name: Replica Atziri's Foible

explicitModifiers.text: +(100-120) to maximum Life
(20-30)% increased Life Regeneration rate
Items and Gems have 25% reduced Attribute Requirements

items.flavourText:
"A rare unequivocal success, Prototype #11 causes wounds to heal so quickly
the type Delta test subject actually survived the entire testing regimen."

items.name: Replica Karui Ward

explicitModifiers.text: +(20-30) to Intelligence
+100 to Accuracy Rating
(10-12)% increased Movement Speed
30% increased Area of Effect
30% increased Area Damage

items.flavourText:
"In testing, Prototype #9 had no effect on fired arrows. However,
an unknown spell did destroy the entire firing chamber."

items.name: Replica Prismweave

explicitModifiers.text: Adds (14-19) to (30-38) Fire Damage to Spells
Adds (10-14) to (24-33) Cold Damage to Spells
Adds 1 to (60-81) Lightning Damage to Spells
+(6-15)% to all Elemental Resistances
(30-36)% increased Elemental Damage during any Flask Effect

items.flavourText:
"A legion of forty soldiers attempted to break into Outpost Five and
steal Prototype #659. What do they know that we do not?"

items.name: Replica Soul Tether

explicitModifiers.text: +(20-48) to Strength
Gain (4-7)% of Maximum Life as Extra Maximum Energy Shield
Corrupted Soul

items.flavourText:
"Curious. The test spike penetrated the subject's flesh, but the chest wound
was not as deep as expected. There is something here..."

items.name: Replica Emberwake

explicitModifiers.text: (30-48)% increased Fire Damage
(5-10)% increased Cast Speed
90% reduced Ignite Duration on Enemies
10% chance to Ignite
Ignites you inflict deal Damage (35-54)% faster

items.flavourText:
"The flames raced through Lab Five with incredible speed, but were extinguished
just as quickly. This could have been much worse." 
- Lead Researcher Ksaret

items.name: Replica Voideye

explicitModifiers.text: +30% to Quality of Socketed Gems

items.flavourText: "So close, yet frustratingly distinct. Something more is going on here..."

items.name: Replica Siegebreaker

explicitModifiers.text: (6-10)% increased maximum Energy Shield
(6-10)% increased maximum Life
+(15-25)% to Fire Resistance
Your Minions spread Burning Ground on Death, dealing 20% of their maximum Life as Fire Damage per second
Minions have 5% chance to Maim Enemies on Hit with Attacks

items.flavourText:
"Recommend extreme caution on any prototypes that can lead to a chain reaction
of deaths. Lab Twelve has been lost to the flames." 
- Lead Researcher Ksaret

items.name: Replica Hinekora's Sight

explicitModifiers.text: +(600-1198) to Accuracy Rating
+(600-1200) to Armour
+1% to all maximum Elemental Resistances
You cannot be Maimed

items.flavourText:
"I touched #2993, and I saw... how blind we've been. The visions
weren't the future. They were the past! Our 'unforeseen
consequences' have already been happening!"
- Researcher Graven

items.name: Replica Doedre's Damning

explicitModifiers.text: +(5-20) to Intelligence
+(5-20)% to all Elemental Resistances
Gain (5-20) Mana per Enemy Killed
You can apply one fewer Curse
(10-18)% increased Effect of your Curses

items.flavourText:
"Prototype #8 makes it difficult to think negatively, but two fatalities
resulted when a lead researcher used an epithet in its presence."

items.flavourText:
"Did we make this? Why do we have no record of it?
We were warned that there would be consequences..."
- Administrator Qotra

items.name: Replica Hyrri's Truth

explicitModifiers.text: Grants Level 22 Hatred Skill
+(30-55) to Dexterity
+(18-35)% to Global Critical Strike Multiplier
Bow Attacks have Culling Strike
Hatred has 100% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency

items.flavourText:
"The type Delta test subjects could have escaped with the power offered by
Prototype #15, but they suddenly chose to murder each other instead..."

items.name: Replica Winterheart

explicitModifiers.text: +(20-30) to Dexterity
+(50-70) to maximum Energy Shield
+75% to Lightning Resistance
Regenerate 5% of Energy Shield per second while Shocked
Unaffected by Shock

items.flavourText:
"Researcher Graven spent eleven hours suffering electrocution in the lab
before he was found. Prototype #14 somehow kept him from dying."

items.name: Replica Gifts from Above

explicitModifiers.text: Trigger Level 10 Consecrate when you deal a Critical Strike
(30-35)% increased Global Critical Strike Chance
(10-15)% increased Light Radius
(40-50)% increased Rarity of Items Dropped by Enemies killed with a Critical Strike
Inflict Hallowing Flame on Hit while on Consecrated Ground

items.flavourText:
"Our first Prototype. Proof that it can be done.
The Templars will give us everything we need,
now... but we must keep our true goal secret."

items.name: Replica Malachai's Artifice

explicitModifiers.text: All Sockets are White
Socketed Gems have Secrets of Suffering
-20% to all Elemental Resistances
+(75-100)% to Fire Resistance when Socketed with a Red Gem
+(75-100)% to Cold Resistance when Socketed with a Green Gem
+(75-100)% to Lightning Resistance when Socketed with a Blue Gem

items.flavourText:
"As much as Prototype #20 hints at some deep alternate physics, we cannot afford
to expend any more test subjects. Experiments halted."
- Administrator Qotra

items.name: Replica Duskdawn

implicitModifiers.text: +25% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff

explicitModifiers.text: +10% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
(40-50)% increased Critical Strike Chance
Gain (10-20)% of Elemental Damage as Extra Chaos Damage
+1% to Critical Strike Multiplier per 1% Chance to Block Attack Damage
+60% to Critical Strike Multiplier if you've dealt a Non-Critical Strike Recently
(122-150)% increased Elemental Damage if you've dealt a Critical Strike Recently

items.flavourText:
"Lab Two suffered significant structural damage in the process of creating
Prototype #77. It is, however, the closest we've come to perfection."

items.name: Replica Iron Commander

explicitModifiers.text: Adds (8-12) to (16-24) Physical Damage

(14-20)% increased Totem Life

Adds 1 to 3 Physical Damage to Attacks per 25 Strength

items.flavourText:
"Admittedly lacking the finesse of the fabled original,
Prototype #4 achieved identical results through brute force alone."

items.name: Replica Kongor's Undying Rage

explicitModifiers.text: Adds (45-56) to (343-400) Physical Damage
(30-40)% increased Critical Strike Chance
+(15-20)% to all Elemental Resistances
Hits can't be Evaded
Your Critical Strikes do not deal extra Damage
Regenerate 20% of Energy Shield per second if you've dealt a Critical Strike with this weapon Recently

items.flavourText:
"Prototype #599 offers an incredible defensive power, but at a cost.
What underlying physics are at play here, I wonder?"

items.flavourText:
"Why is Prototype #67 never in the vault it should be?
Either we're keeping faulty logs, or..." 
- Researcher Graven

items.flavourText:
"How did you manage to lodge arrows in every single test subject

explicitModifiers.text: (80-100)% increased Evasion Rating
60% increased Mana Regeneration Rate
+(20-30)% to Cold Resistance
+(20-30)% to Lightning Resistance
Gain 1% of Lightning Damage as Extra Cold Damage per 2% Shock Effect on Enemy

items.flavourText:
"The storm... that lightning... I'd be dead if I hadn't...
but it was cold. Ice cold! It's not what we think, and
the plan won't work! Where's Arn?! I have to tell him!"
- Researcher Graven, infirmary report

items.name: Replica Maloney's Mechanism

explicitModifiers.text: Has 2 Sockets

Trigger a Socketed Bow Skill when you Cast a Spell while
wielding a Bow, with a 1 second Cooldown
(7-12)% increased Cast Speed
+(50-70) to maximum Life
5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks

items.flavourText:
"The Midnight Tinkerer's aid was invaluable during our brief alliance,
but when we failed to make any progress on resurrection, he continued his search elsewhere..."

items.name: Replica Restless Ward

explicitModifiers.text: (220-250)% increased Evasion and Energy Shield
+(60-80) to maximum Life
6% increased Movement Speed per Frenzy Charge
-2 to Maximum Endurance Charges
-2 to Maximum Frenzy Charges
Regenerate (100.1-140) Life per second per Endurance Charge

items.flavourText:
"Further research must be done on Prototype #282.
There is power here, if it can be tapped."

(100-120)% increased Armour
(40-50)% increased Elemental Damage taken

items.flavourText:
"While Prototype #3 does imbue its wearer with strength to match the original,
the first researcher to don it burst into flames when he walked into sunlight..."

+(122-160) to maximum Life
+(122-160) to maximum Mana
(6-29)% increased Rarity of Items found

Your Maximum Resistances are (70-72)%

items.flavourText:
"Better... stronger... more vital... and then... failure. Always, failure.
What key fundamental secret are we missing?"

items.flavourText:
"Prototype #7 achieved even greater injury responsiveness than expected,

items.flavourText:
"Prototype #73 is a near perfect opposite of the original. Perhaps our failures
are due to some unknown polarity we have yet to discover."

items.flavourText:
"For personal defence, Prototype #444 is fantastic. It is one hundred percent
effective seventy five percent of the time... once." 
- Lead Researcher Ksaret

items.name: Replica Perfect Form

explicitModifiers.text: 20% Chance to Block Attack Damage
(150-200)% increased Evasion Rating
-30% to Cold Resistance
Evasion Rating is increased by Overcapped Cold Resistance
Versatile Combatant

items.flavourText:
"This is what I've been trying to tell you. This prototype
was different before. Now, it's always been this way!"
- Researcher Graven

items.name: Replica Red Trail

explicitModifiers.text: (60-100)% increased Armour
+(60-100) to maximum Life
30% increased Movement Speed
Gain a Power Charge on Hit while Poisoned
+30% to Chaos Resistance while stationary
Necrotic Footprints

items.flavourText:
"Researchers will please refrain from combining our prototypes with existing relics
of power. The temptation is obvious, but the results can be... unpredictable." 
- Administrator Qotra

+(20-30)% to Chaos Resistance

items.flavourText:
"Test subject walked right through the poison gas defenses, and attempts to slow her
failed. Suppression troop six, the 'Furious Flagellants,' have been sent to intervene."

items.flavourText:
"Test subject was able to walk into the walls of his chamber after breaking a rabbit's neck.
He was not fast enough, however. Suggest we begin excavation to retrieve prototype."

items.name: Replica Victario's Charity

items.flavourText:
"Close to the original, and perhaps even more useful. However,
close is not what we are looking for. Keep trying." 
- Administrator Qotra

items.flavourText:
"The theft of another's vitality is short-lived, but sweet.
It calls to me, bidding me abandon all other pursuits."
- Researcher Arn

items.flavourText:

common with Thought Extractor technology."

items.flavourText:

items.flavourText:
"Outpost Twelve has been abandoned. On the bright side, I expect the plague of apparitions
to serve as ample defence for the relics we left behind." 
- Administrator Qotra

items.flavourText:
